Claudio Bravo.bio: Legendary Chilean goalkeeper and former Barcelona and Manchester City number one. Captain of the golden generation that won back-to-back Copa America titles in 2015 and 2016.
Claudio Bravo.playingStyle: Ball-playing goalkeeper with exceptional distribution and sweeper-keeper qualities
Claudio Bravo.worldCup2026Role: Veteran presence and potential captain providing invaluable experience and leadership to the squad
Claudio Bravo.notableFact: Won the Copa America in 2015 and 2016, saving penalties in both finals to become a national hero

Eugenio Mena.bio: Long-serving Chilean left-back who has been a reliable member of La Roja for over a decade. Has played in multiple World Cups and Copa America tournaments.
Eugenio Mena.playingStyle: Steady, experienced left-back who provides defensive solidity and overlapping width
Eugenio Mena.worldCup2026Role: Veteran backup left-back providing depth and tournament experience from the bench
Eugenio Mena.notableFact: Was part of Chile's squads at the 2014 World Cup and both Copa America-winning campaigns

Guillermo Maripán.bio: Imposing Chilean center-back who has been a regular starter at Monaco in Ligue 1. Combines physical presence with ability on the ball, making him a modern center-back.
Guillermo Maripán.playingStyle: Tall, commanding center-back who dominates aerial duels and steps forward with the ball
Guillermo Maripán.worldCup2026Role: Starting center-back and defensive leader organizing the backline
Guillermo Maripán.notableFact: Has been a consistent performer in Ligue 1 with Monaco for several seasons, playing regularly in European competition

Mauricio Isla.bio: Iconic Chilean right-back with an incredibly long career spanning Juventus, Marseille, Fenerbahce, and Flamengo. One of the most capped Chilean players of all time.
Mauricio Isla.playingStyle: Tireless wing-back who covers the entire flank with energy and determination
Mauricio Isla.worldCup2026Role: Experienced squad member who provides leadership and can deputize at right-back
Mauricio Isla.notableFact: Won Serie A with Juventus and played in the Champions League, amassing over 140 caps for Chile

Erick Pulgar.bio: Solid central midfielder who has played in Serie A with Fiorentina and Bologna before moving to Brazilian football with Flamengo. Known for his set-piece delivery and physical presence.
Erick Pulgar.playingStyle: Strong, combative midfielder who wins duels and delivers dangerous set pieces
Erick Pulgar.worldCup2026Role: Starting central midfielder providing steel, set-piece quality, and experience
Erick Pulgar.notableFact: Known for his dangerous free kicks, he has scored several spectacular goals from dead-ball situations throughout his career

Francisco Sierralta.bio: Tall Chilean center-back playing his trade in the English Championship with Watford. A physical defender who has been developing his game in the competitive English league system.
Francisco Sierralta.playingStyle: Physical, no-nonsense center-back who excels in aerial duels and one-on-one defending
Francisco Sierralta.worldCup2026Role: Defensive depth option providing additional cover at center-back
Francisco Sierralta.notableFact: Has gained valuable experience playing in the demanding English Championship with Watford

Alexis Sánchez.bio: Chile's greatest ever player and all-time leading scorer. A global star who shone at Barcelona, Arsenal, and Manchester United, leading Chile to their two Copa America titles with electrifying performances.
Alexis Sánchez.playingStyle: Relentless, high-pressing forward who combines tireless work rate with devastating finishing and creativity
Alexis Sánchez.worldCup2026Role: Talisman, leader, and attacking inspiration whose presence lifts the entire squad
Alexis Sánchez.notableFact: Chile's all-time top scorer with 50 goals, he won the Copa America Golden Ball award and was Arsenal's Player of the Year

Arturo Vidal.bio: Legendary Chilean warrior-midfielder who has won league titles with Juventus, Bayern Munich, Barcelona, and Inter Milan. One of the most decorated South American players of his generation.
Arturo Vidal.playingStyle: Aggressive, all-action box-to-box midfielder who tackles, presses, shoots, and leads by example
Arturo Vidal.worldCup2026Role: Veteran leader and midfield warrior who brings intensity, experience, and a winning mentality
Arturo Vidal.notableFact: Has won league titles in Italy, Germany, Spain, and Italy again, making him one of the most decorated Chilean players ever

Jean Meneses.bio: Chilean winger who has built his career in Mexican football with Toluca and previously Leon. A direct attacker who provides width and pace from the left flank.
Jean Meneses.playingStyle: Quick, direct winger who uses his pace to stretch defenses and deliver crosses
Jean Meneses.worldCup2026Role: Wide attacking option providing pace and width from the bench
Jean Meneses.notableFact: Has been a standout performer in Liga MX, earning regular call-ups to the Chilean national team

Darío Osorio.bio: Electrifying young Chilean talent who represents the future of La Roja. Moved to Europe at a young age with FC Midtjylland and has been compared to Alexis Sanchez for his direct style.
Darío Osorio.playingStyle: Quick, skilful young attacker who runs at defenders with confidence and creates chances with his dribbling
Darío Osorio.worldCup2026Role: Exciting young starter or impact player who can change games with his individual brilliance
Darío Osorio.notableFact: Left Universidad de Chile as a teenager to pursue his career in Europe, seen as the heir to Alexis Sanchez

Eduardo Vargas.bio: Prolific Chilean striker who is one of the greatest goalscorers in Copa America history. Has played across Europe and South America, always delivering for the national team.
Eduardo Vargas.playingStyle: Instinctive striker who makes clever runs and finishes with composure in big moments
Eduardo Vargas.worldCup2026Role: Experienced striker providing tournament pedigree and a proven goalscoring record
Eduardo Vargas.notableFact: Joint-top scorer in Copa America history, including four goals in Chile's victorious 2015 tournament on home soil

Gabriel Arias.bio: Argentinean-born goalkeeper who chose to represent Chile at international level. Has been a reliable option in goal with experience in Argentinean football at Racing Club.
Gabriel Arias.playingStyle: Confident goalkeeper with strong shot-stopping and good command of his area
Gabriel Arias.worldCup2026Role: Second-choice goalkeeper providing experienced backup between the posts
Gabriel Arias.notableFact: Born in Argentina, he qualified for Chile through residency and has become a regular in the national team setup

Paulo Díaz.bio: Chilean center-back who has been one of the best defenders in Argentine football with River Plate. Previously played in the Saudi Pro League before returning to South America.
Paulo Díaz.playingStyle: Quick, modern center-back who defends aggressively and is comfortable with the ball at his feet
Paulo Díaz.worldCup2026Role: Starting center-back who provides pace and quality at the back
Paulo Díaz.notableFact: Has been a key part of River Plate's success in recent years, playing in Copa Libertadores knockout rounds

Gary Medel.bio: Iconic Chilean defender nicknamed 'The Pitbull' for his fierce, combative style. Despite his relatively short stature, he is one of the most feared tacklers in South American football.
Gary Medel.playingStyle: Ultra-aggressive, fearless defender who compensates for his lack of height with incredible tenacity and timing
Gary Medel.worldCup2026Role: Veteran defensive leader whose fierce determination and experience inspire the entire squad
Gary Medel.notableFact: Nicknamed 'El Pitbull' for his aggressive defending style, he has over 155 caps and has played in Serie A, La Liga, and the Premier League

Diego Valdés.bio: Creative Chilean playmaker who has been a standout performer in Liga MX with Club America. Left-footed and inventive, he provides the creative spark from an attacking midfield position.
Diego Valdés.playingStyle: Left-footed playmaker who picks out passes, drives forward, and creates scoring opportunities
Diego Valdés.worldCup2026Role: Starting or key rotation attacking midfielder providing creativity behind the strikers
Diego Valdés.notableFact: Has been one of the most productive playmakers in Liga MX during his time at Club America

Marcelino Núñez.bio: Dynamic young Chilean midfielder playing at Norwich City in the English Championship. A left-footed creator with an eye for spectacular goals from distance.
Marcelino Núñez.playingStyle: Left-footed midfielder who drives forward with the ball and strikes powerfully from range
Marcelino Núñez.worldCup2026Role: Key midfielder who provides goals, assists, and energy from the center of the park
Marcelino Núñez.notableFact: Has scored several spectacular long-range goals for both Norwich City and Chile, earning comparisons to Arturo Vidal

Víctor Dávila.bio: Chilean winger who has played in Mexico and Russia, gaining experience across different footballing cultures. A direct and pacy attacker who provides options on the left wing.
Víctor Dávila.playingStyle: Pacy, direct winger who beats defenders with skill and pace before delivering crosses or cutting inside
Víctor Dávila.worldCup2026Role: Wide attacking option providing pace and directness from the bench or as a starter
Víctor Dávila.notableFact: Has gained unique international experience playing in both Liga MX and the Russian Premier League

Gabriel Suazo.bio: Modern Chilean left-back who made the move to European football with Toulouse in Ligue 1. Formerly captain of Colo-Colo, he combines defensive ability with attacking contribution.
Gabriel Suazo.playingStyle: Overlapping left-back who delivers dangerous crosses and provides width in attack
Gabriel Suazo.worldCup2026Role: Starting left-back providing width, crossing quality, and defensive reliability
Gabriel Suazo.notableFact: Was named captain of Colo-Colo at a young age before earning a move to European football with Toulouse

Lucas Assadi.bio: Prodigious young Chilean talent who broke into Universidad de Chile's first team as a teenager. Considered one of Chile's brightest prospects with exceptional technical ability.
Lucas Assadi.playingStyle: Gifted young playmaker with silky technique, close control, and creative vision beyond his years
Lucas Assadi.worldCup2026Role: Exciting young talent who can provide a spark of creativity from the bench
Lucas Assadi.notableFact: Made his professional debut at just 16 years old, becoming one of the youngest players to represent Universidad de Chile

Charles Aránguiz.bio: Masterful Chilean midfielder who was a key member of the golden generation. Starred in the Bundesliga with Bayer Leverkusen for years and is regarded as one of Chile's most intelligent players.
Charles Aránguiz.playingStyle: Intelligent, press-resistant midfielder who controls games with his passing and tactical awareness
Charles Aránguiz.worldCup2026Role: Experienced midfield general who controls the tempo and provides crucial composure in big moments
Charles Aránguiz.notableFact: Won the Copa America Best Player award in 2015 and was named in the Bundesliga Team of the Season during his time at Leverkusen

Ben Brereton Díaz.bio: English-born Chilean striker who discovered his Chilean heritage through his mother and chose to represent La Roja. Quickly became a fan favorite with his wholehearted performances.
Ben Brereton Díaz.playingStyle: Strong, mobile striker who runs channels, wins aerial duels, and finishes with power
Ben Brereton Díaz.worldCup2026Role: Starting striker or key attacking option who provides a physical focal point for the attack
Ben Brereton Díaz.notableFact: Born in Stoke-on-Trent, England, he learned of his Chilean eligibility and immediately became a cult hero in Chile after choosing La Roja

Brayan Cortés.bio: Chilean goalkeeper who has been outstanding for Colo-Colo in domestic football. Known for his shot-stopping ability and commanding presence in goal.
Brayan Cortés.playingStyle: Athletic goalkeeper with quick reflexes and confident handling of crosses
Brayan Cortés.worldCup2026Role: Third-choice goalkeeper competing for a starting spot or providing reliable backup
Brayan Cortés.notableFact: Has been one of the best goalkeepers in Chilean domestic football during his time at Colo-Colo

Tomás Alarcón.bio: Young Chilean midfielder who moved to Spanish football with Cadiz. A tidy passer who provides balance and composure in the center of midfield.
Tomás Alarcón.playingStyle: Neat, composed midfielder who keeps play ticking over with simple, effective passing
Tomás Alarcón.worldCup2026Role: Young midfield depth option who can step in to provide composure and control
Tomás Alarcón.notableFact: Made the move from Chilean football to La Liga 2, gaining valuable European experience at a young age

Igor Lichnovsky.bio: Chilean center-back of Croatian descent who has built a strong career in Liga MX with Club America. A composed defender with good reading of the game.
Igor Lichnovsky.playingStyle: Calm, intelligent center-back who reads danger early and passes cleanly out of defense
Igor Lichnovsky.worldCup2026Role: Defensive rotation option providing calm, experienced cover at center-back
Igor Lichnovsky.notableFact: Spent time in Real Madrid's youth academy before building his senior career in Mexican football

Clemente Montes.bio: Young Chilean winger who has been developing at Universidad Catolica in the domestic league. A direct and pacy attacker with potential for growth.
Clemente Montes.playingStyle: Quick, direct winger who runs at defenders and looks to create or score
Clemente Montes.worldCup2026Role: Young squad player gaining tournament experience and providing attacking depth from the bench
Clemente Montes.notableFact: Has been identified as one of Chilean football's brightest young talents at Universidad Catolica

Alexander Aravena.bio: Exciting young Chilean striker who has burst onto the scene at Universidad Catolica. A promising forward who represents the next generation of Chilean attacking talent.
Alexander Aravena.playingStyle: Mobile, energetic young striker with sharp finishing and clever movement in the box
Alexander Aravena.worldCup2026Role: Young striker providing energy and fresh attacking options from the bench
Alexander Aravena.notableFact: Emerged as one of the top young strikers in the Chilean Primera Division, earning a rapid rise to the national team
